creator: KOT@MATPOCKuH.Ru
text:
oops doesn't support REPORT method, for example used by svn:
Mon Dec 12 14:42:18 2011  [0x49dd3800]parse_http_request(): Unrecognized method `REPORT'.

Fix: Apply attached patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Using oops as proxy server try:
svn checkout http://anonsvn.icefaces.org/repo/icefaces3/trunk/icefaces/
